panel.dragHint: Drag a display tile to change its position. The selected tile can also have its resolution changed from the inspector.
panel.selectionHint: Select a display from the arrangement area to inspect and edit it.
panel.empty: No displays were returned by the backend.
panel.configDescription: Copy the configuration command for your compositor below. Add it to your config file to make your display layout permanent.
settings.backend.label: Backend
settings.backend.desc: Choose how Layout Mon should talk to the compositor.
settings.swayCommand.label: Sway command
settings.swayCommand.desc: Command used to read and apply output configuration.
settings.hyprctlCommand.label: Hyprctl command
settings.hyprctlCommand.desc: Command used to read and apply output configuration.
settings.snapToGrid.label: Snap dragged displays to a grid
settings.gridSize.label: Grid size
settings.gridSize.desc: Grid size in layout pixels when snapping is enabled.
settings.iconColor.label: Icon color
errors.fetchFailed: Failed to read output state from the compositor.
errors.applyFailed: Failed to apply the display layout.
errors.unsupportedBackend: This backend is not implemented yet.
